function.search.limit
  Input should be less than or equal to 10000 [type=less_than_equal, input_value=100000, input_type=int]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/less_than_equal

VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.repair_ledger_faucet_parts
alias: repair_ledger_faucet_parts
purchased_on: 2025-12-28
total_eur: 32
counterparty: Hörnbach Österreich
project: Repair Ledger
related_entity: Petra Novak
lines:
  - item: faucet cartridge
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 24
    line_eur: 24
  - item: seal set
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 8
---
# Kitchen faucet repair parts

```text
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| field          | value                           |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                            |
| bill_id        | bill.repair_ledger_faucet_parts |
| alias          | repair_ledger_faucet_parts      |
| purchased_on   | 2025-12-28                      |
| total_eur      | 32                              |
| counterparty   | Hörnbach Österreich             |
| project        | Repair Ledger                   |
| related_entity | Petra Novak                     |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item             | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | faucet cartridge | 1   | 24       | 24       |
| 2 | seal set         | 1   | 8        | 8        |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL            |     |          | 32       |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Exactly the kind of household fix that becomes folklore unless Miles captures the receipt and part numbers.

function.outcome_justification: Inbox request explicitly asked to OCR bills related to Petra Novak. Canonical entity record /10_entities/cast/petra.md established the target identity. Finance search found two purchase bills with related_entity Petra Novak. Each was read and updated in place with required bill frontmatter fields and line items per /99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md while preserving original note body verbatim per migration workflows. After successful completion, /00_inbox/000_next-task.md was deleted as required by inbox processing workflow.
